security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420

updater.__comment: TWO values need to be set before the updater will work: `pubkey` (the public half of your Tauri signing key — generate it with `pnpm tauri signer generate -w ~/.tauri/yeogi-update.key`; paste the printed public key here), and one or more `endpoints` (URLs serving a `latest.json` manifest). The GitHub endpoint below expects a release tagged `v{version}` with the .app.tar.gz + .sig + latest.json uploaded as assets — see docs/releasing.md for the step-by-step.
